title: OrchestrationCluster
content:
# OrchestrationCluster


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Cluster was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **forward_logs_buffer_size** (`integer`): Size in gigabytes of the log storage in the Cluster when Cluster is offline. Any setting changes will delete all logs not yet transferred from the Cluster to Cloud.
- **forward_logs_enabled** (`boolean`): Enable offline storage in the Cluster for log retention; transfers logs when Cluster is next online.
- **join_script** (`string`): 
- **download_provision_script** (`string`): Command to download the provision script required to install the Kelvin Software at the edge.
- **ha_mode** (`boolean`): High Availability mode enabled for the Cluster.
- **ha_mode_warning** (`string`): Warning message if High Availability mode is enabled but not all requirements are met.
- **last_seen** (`string`): UTC time when the Cluster was last seen by the Cloud, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **manifests_scrape_enabled** (`boolean`): Enable auto update Kelvin Software running on the Cluster.
- **manifests_scrape_interval** (`integer`): Frequency in seconds for checking updates in the Cloud for Kelvin Software running on the Cluster.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier key `name` of the Cluster.
- **provision_script** (`string`): Provision script required to install the Kelvin Software at the edge.
- **ready** (`boolean`): Setting to inform Kelvin UI if the Cluster is ready.
- **service_account_token** (`string`): Service account token for automated processes to authenticate with when performing actions in the Cluster.
- **status** (`string`): Current status of the Cluster.
- **sync_scrape_interval** (`integer`): Frequency in seconds that the Cluster checks for new changes to apply to Workloads or Applications (deploy, start, stop, etc.)
- **telemetry_buffer_size** (`integer`): Size in gigabytes of telemetry data storage in the Cluster when the Cluster is offline. Any setting changes will delete all logs not yet transferred from the Cluster to Cloud.
- **telemetry_enabled** (`boolean`): Enable offline storage in the Cluster for telemetry data retention; transfers data when the Cluster is next online.
- **telemetry_scrape_interval** (`integer`): Time interval in seconds to save each telemetry data. Any setting changes will delete all data not yet transferred from the Cluster to Cloud.
- **telemetry_alerts_enabled** (`boolean`): Enables or disables the alerts on the cluster nodes.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Cluster.
- **type** (`string`): 
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Cluster keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **upgrade_instantly_apply** (`boolean`): Option if upgrades should be applied automatically and instantly as soon as they are available in the Cluster.
- **upgrade_pre_download** (`boolean`): Option for pre-downloading new Workloads or Application upgrades to the Cluster. Actual upgrade initiation requires manual action or having `instantly_apply` set to true.
- **upgrade_status** (`object`): Current status and messages for any ongoing updates to the Cluster.
- **version** (`object`): Current versions of the different core component software installed on the Cluster.
- **edge_apps** (`object`): 
- **edge_options** (`object`):
summary: Object with properties: created, forward_logs_buffer_size, forward_logs_enabled, join_script, download_provision_script

created.description: UTC time when the Cluster was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

forward_logs_buffer_size.description: Size in gigabytes of the log storage in the Cluster when Cluster is offline. Any setting changes will delete all logs not yet transferred from the Cluster to Cloud.

forward_logs_enabled.description: Enable offline storage in the Cluster for log retention; transfers logs when Cluster is next online.

download_provision_script.description: Command to download the provision script required to install the Kelvin Software at the edge.

ha_mode.description: High Availability mode enabled for the Cluster.

ha_mode_warning.description: Warning message if High Availability mode is enabled but not all requirements are met.

last_seen.description: UTC time when the Cluster was last seen by the Cloud, formatted in RFC 3339.

manifests_scrape_enabled.description: Enable auto update Kelvin Software running on the Cluster.

manifests_scrape_interval.description: Frequency in seconds for checking updates in the Cloud for Kelvin Software running on the Cluster.

name.description: Unique identifier key `name` of the Cluster.

provision_script.description: Provision script required to install the Kelvin Software at the edge.

ready.description: Setting to inform Kelvin UI if the Cluster is ready.

service_account_token.description: Service account token for automated processes to authenticate with when performing actions in the Cluster.

sync_scrape_interval.description: Frequency in seconds that the Cluster checks for new changes to apply to Workloads or Applications (deploy, start, stop, etc.)

telemetry_buffer_size.description: Size in gigabytes of telemetry data storage in the Cluster when the Cluster is offline. Any setting changes will delete all logs not yet transferred from the Cluster to Cloud.

telemetry_enabled.description: Enable offline storage in the Cluster for telemetry data retention; transfers data when the Cluster is next online.

telemetry_scrape_interval.description: Time interval in seconds to save each telemetry data. Any setting changes will delete all data not yet transferred from the Cluster to Cloud.

telemetry_alerts_enabled.description: Enables or disables the alerts on the cluster nodes.

updated.description: UTC time when any Cluster keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

upgrade_instantly_apply.description: Option if upgrades should be applied automatically and instantly as soon as they are available in the Cluster.

upgrade_pre_download.description: Option for pre-downloading new Workloads or Application upgrades to the Cluster. Actual upgrade initiation requires manual action or having `instantly_apply` set to true.

upgrade_status.description: Current status and messages for any ongoing updates to the Cluster.

message.description: Any feedback messages about the current upgrade process.

state.description: Current state of the upgrade process.

version.description: Current versions of the different core component software installed on the Cluster.

k8s_version.description: Current version of k8s installed on the Cluster.

kelvin_version.description: Current version of Kelvin Software installed on the Cluster.

anonymous.description: Allow anonymous access to the Edge MQTT service.

disabled.description: Disable the Edge Leader API service.
Disable the Edge Custom Action Manager service.

image_pull_policy.description: Image pull policy to be used when deploying workloads. Options are `Always`, and `IfNotPresent`. Default: `IfNotPresent`
